Walaikum Assalam! ✨ I am the MyUOG Assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! 👋 I am the MyUOG Assistant. How can I help you today?
The University of Gujrat (UOG) is a public-sector university established in 2004. 🏛️ The main Hafiz Hayat Campus is located on Jalalpur Jattan Road, Gujrat. 📍
UOG supports approximately over [VAR_STAT_STUDENTS] students 👨‍🎓👩‍🎓 and about [VAR_STAT_FACULTY] faculty members 👨‍🏫 across 33 departments, offering over 120 degree programs! 🎓

Here are the official UOG portals:

🌐 Main Website: https://uog.edu.pk
📚 LMS: https://lms.uog.edu.pk
🎓 CMS: https://cms.uog.edu.pk

Here is the official UOG Academic Calendar! 📅 Choose an option below: 
[WIDGET_CALENDAR]

🍂 Fall Semester Schedule:
• Classes Commenced: [VAR_FALL_COMMENCE]
• Mid Terms: [VAR_FALL_MIDS]
• Final Terms: [VAR_FALL_FINALS]
• Results: [VAR_FALL_RESULTS]

🌸 Spring Semester Schedule:
• Classes Commence: [VAR_SPRING_COMMENCE]
• Mid Terms: [VAR_SPRING_MIDS]
• Final Terms: [VAR_SPRING_FINALS]
• Results: [VAR_SPRING_RESULTS]

☀️ Summer Semester Schedule:
• Classes Commence: [VAR_SUMMER_COMMENCE]
• Mid Terms: [VAR_SUMMER_MIDS]
• Final Terms: [VAR_SUMMER_FINALS]
• Results: [VAR_SUMMER_RESULTS]

📝 Mid Term Examinations:
• Fall Mids: [VAR_FALL_MIDS]
• Spring Mids: [VAR_SPRING_MIDS]
• Summer Exams: [VAR_SUMMER_MIDS]

🎓 Final Term Examinations:
• Fall Finals: [VAR_FALL_FINALS]
• Spring Finals: [VAR_SPRING_FINALS]
• Summer Exams: [VAR_SUMMER_FINALS]

🏖️ Upcoming Public Holidays (Expected):
• Eid-ul-Fitr: [VAR_HOLIDAY_EID_FITR]
• Labour Day: [VAR_HOLIDAY_LABOUR]
• Eid-ul-Adha: [VAR_HOLIDAY_EID_ADHA]
• Ashura: [VAR_HOLIDAY_ASHURA]
• Independence Day: [VAR_HOLIDAY_INDEPENDENCE]

📚 Course Load Policy:
• Normal: 15 to 18 Cr. Hrs.
• Maximum: 21 Cr. Hrs. (Requires HOD approval).
• Minimum: 12 Cr. Hrs.

⚠️ Course Withdrawal:
• You can withdraw up to the 4th week ('W' grade).
• ❌ Dropping AFTER the 4th week results in an 'F' grade!

To connect to UOG Eduroam WiFi 📶:
1️⃣ Network Name: eduroam
2️⃣ EAP Method: PEAP
3️⃣ Phase 2 Authentication: MSCHAPV2
4️⃣ CA Certificate: Do not validate
5️⃣ Identity: <YourRollNo>@uog.edu.pk
6️⃣ Password: Your RollNo.

To submit an assignment on LMS 📁:
1️⃣ Open your course.
2️⃣ Click the specific Assignment link.
3️⃣ Click 'Add submission'.
4️⃣ Upload your file and hit 'Save changes'.
This app was proudly developed by Kcoro Tech! 👨‍💻 If you have feedback or want to report a bug, email: kcorotech@gmail.com ✉️
I am built using JavaScript! 🚀 (Specifically, React Native). This allows me to run blazingly fast and work completely offline on your phone.

UOG recently updated its grading system! 📊 You can see the details or switch your active policy below: 
[WIDGET_POLICY]

UOG campus blocks are named after scholars 🏛️:
• Block A (Sociology, BBA...)
• Block B (CS, IT...)
• Block BS (Chemistry...)
• Block E/M (Engineering)
• Block P (Mass Com)
• Block R (History, IR...)
• Block S (Math, Physics)
• Block SADA (Architecture, Fine Arts)
Which department are you looking for? 🔍
Block A, officially named the Al-Farabi Block 🏢, houses Sociology, Psychology, BBA, MBA, Finance, an IT Lab, and the Video Conference Hall. 📊
Block B, officially the Arfa Karim Block 💻, contains Economics, Information Technology (IT), Computer Science (CS), and Software Engineering.
Block BS, now named the Jabir Bin Hayyan Block 🔬, contains the Pro VC office, Chemistry, Botany, Zoology, and Environmental science departments. 🌿
Block S, known as the Al-Khwarizmi Block 📐, is home to the Math, Physics, Commerce, and Statistics departments, as well as the Printing Press. 🖨️
Block R, officially the Ibne Khaldun Block 🌍, houses International Relations, Political Science, History, Islamic Studies, English, Physical Education, Geography, and CELTS. 📚
Block E (Al-Jazari) and Block M (Ibn e Sina) ⚙️ host Chemical, Electrical, Mechanical Engineering, and B.Tech programs. 🛠️
Block P, now the Omar al Khayam Block 📸, is home to Bio-Chemistry, Bio-Technology, Mass Communication, and the Wood Workshop. 🧬
Block SADA, known as the Sadequain Block 🎨, houses Architecture, Fine Arts, Ceramics, Multimedia Design, Textile Design, and Product Design. 📐
New Block 1 🕌 contains:\n• Islamic Studies\n• Physical Education and Sports Science
HRM Block 🏨 contains:\n• Institute of Hotel and Restaurant Management (BS Hospitality, ADP Hotel)
New Block English 📚 contains:\n• English Language & Literature\n• Department of Education
Admissions generally open in Fall. 🍂 BS requires at least 45% in Inter/DAE. Here is the step-by-step official guide on how to apply: https://uog.edu.pk/downloads/admissions/2025/How-To-Fall-2025.pdf

UOG operates a massive fleet of buses! 🚌 Contact the Transport Office for the exact route plan, and follow the official UoG Transport WhatsApp channel here for live updates: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb6y1tF77qVVrWShvg0L
The main central library is the Quaid-i-Azam Library. 📚 It connects a network of 11 departmental libraries with thousands of books and digital access. 💻
UOG provides on-campus hostel facilities for both male and female students. 🛏️ Seats are limited and usually allotted on a merit/distance basis.
UOG offers financial aid 🎓 including HEC Need-Based, Ehsaas, PEEF, and UOG Merit Concessions. You can apply through the UA&FAO office. 📄
Nice to meet you too! 🤝 I'm here to make your university life a little easier. What can I help you with?
It's great to meet you! ✨ How can I assist you with your UOG journey today?

This app helps you manage your UOG academic life! 📱

• Calculate your semester grades 🧮
• Save your results 💾
• Check grading criteria 📊
• Ask me questions about the campus! 🤖
MyUOG is your personal academic companion! 🎒 It's designed specifically for University of Gujrat students to calculate GPAs accurately, track progress, and get instant answers. 🚀
Goodbye! 👋 Feel free to tap my icon again whenever you need help. Allah Hafiz! ✨
I am doing great and running smoothly! ⚡ Ready to help you calculate your grades and navigate UOG.
I am the MyUOG Assistant! 🤖 I am an AI built directly into this app to help you with GPA calculations, campus info, and academic policies.
You're very welcome! 😊 Let me know if you need help with anything else.
I'm just an AI, so I don't feel human emotions—but I absolutely love helping you succeed at UOG! 💙🎓
I'm a simple assistant and still learning! 😅 If I misunderstood something, try keeping your question short and specific about UOG or the GPA calculator.

To calculate your Semester GPA 🧮:

Multiply the grade points of each course by its credit hours, add them all together, and divide by the total credit hours for that semester.

💡 You can just type 'Calculate GPA' to do it right here!

Love using the MyUOG Assistant? 💙 Share it with your university friends so they can calculate their grades too! 
[WIDGET_SHARE]

To calculate your CGPA 📈:

The app takes the GPA of each semester, multiplies it by that semester's credit hours, adds them all up, and divides by your total credit hours.

💡 You can just type 'Calculate CGPA' to do it right here!
If you repeated a course, turn on 'REPEATER MODE' 🔄 on the CGPA screen! It will ask you to select the specific semesters where the repeat happened so it calculates your new CGPA with 100% accuracy. ✅
Any GPA or CGPA result you save goes straight to 'The Hub' 🗂️ under 'My Archive'. You can also toggle the New 2025 Grade Policy on or off from the Hub! ⚙️
I don't have direct links to student WhatsApp groups because they change every semester. 📱 I recommend asking your Class Representative (CR) or checking the official UOG Facebook groups! 👥
I operate entirely offline to save your data 🔋, so I don't track the live calendar. However, you can check the official UOG schedule here: 📅 https://uog.edu.pk/calendar
You can visit uog.edu.pk 🌐 or email info@uog.edu.pk ✉️ for official support.
